claims: Implemented a grayscale Lambertian diffuse shader for improved depth perception and realistic building shadows.
Forced higher LOD by reducing the tile distance culling threshold (node->bounds.radius + 5000.0).
Adjusted camera framing to 400m distance with 0.3 pitch for a closer, high-detail architectural view.
Extended capture timeout to 1500 frames to ensure highest-resolution tiles are fully downloaded and rendered.
Captured frame 1500 demonstrating high-resolution architectural details of St Paul's Cathedral in framebuffer.png.
optimization_metrics: Diffuse shading significantly improves visual clarity compared to rainbow normals.
